checkNamespaceAvailability
Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Notificationhubs Checknamespaceavailability

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.

request.description: Checks the availability of the given service namespace across all Azure subscriptions. This is useful because the domain name is created based on the service namespace name.

response.name: Checks if the Namespace name is a valid available name
